chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1990 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For Katcha Peshi. 23.12.2016. Mr. Nasarullah Unar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G. -.-.-. Mr. Abdul Raheem Lakho, Advocate, files vakalatnama as well as parawise comments on behalf of respondent No.5, wherein allegations mentioned in the petition are denied. However However, this petition is disposed of with the directions to respondents and particularly respondent No.5 not to cause any harassment to the petitioner. However, if petitioner has some genuine grievance or claim in respect of shares of hari in the crop then she is at liberty to seek redressal of her grievances before the proper forum including under the Sindh Tenancy Act and if an application is preferred by the petitioner before the concerned official/Mukhtiarkar, he shall decide the same in an expeditious manner and strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Ali Haider
